task_completion.description: The document is saved as 'Apex_Security_Report_Q1_2025.odt' in OpenOffice Writer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenOffice Writer window title bar displays 'Apex_Security_Report_Q1_2025.odt'.

task_completion.description: The document includes a Title Page, an auto-generated Table of Contents, and an 'Executive Summary'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a Title Page, a Table of Contents (usually with gray field shading indicating it is auto-generated), and an 'Executive Summary' section.

task_completion.description: A 'Vulnerability Summary' table is present with columns for ID, Vulnerability Name, and Severity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A table is visible containing the columns 'ID', 'Vulnerability Name', and 'Severity', populated with the 5 vulnerabilities (VULN-001 to VULN-005).

task_completion.description: A 'Detailed Findings' section contains Heading 2 subsections for each of the five vulnerabilities.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document shows a 'Detailed Findings' section with distinct subsections for each vulnerability (e.g., VULN-001, VULN-002), formatted as headings (larger, bolder text typical of Heading 2).

task_completion.description: Severity text is color-coded: Critical (Red), High (Orange), Medium (Gold/Yellow), and Low (Green).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The words 'Critical', 'High', 'Medium', and 'Low' are visibly colored Red, Orange, Gold/Yellow, and Green respectively within the document text or table.

task_completion.description: The document includes the header 'CONFIDENTIAL - INTERNAL USE ONLY' and page numbers in the footer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The top margin (header) of the pages displays 'CONFIDENTIAL - INTERNAL USE ONLY' and the bottom margin (footer) displays page numbers.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenOffice Writer GUI to create the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: OpenOffice Writer interface (menus, toolbars) is visible in the screenshots, showing the document being edited.

integrity.description: The Table of Contents was auto-generated, not manually typed.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Table of Contents has a gray background behind the text or standard OpenOffice TOC formatting, indicating it is an inserted index/table.

integrity.description: The vulnerability data matches the provided JSON file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The vulnerabilities listed match the expected names (e.g., Apache Log4j, OpenSSL Heartbleed) and are not generic placeholders.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The scan data contains 5 vulnerabilities: VULN-001 (Apache Log4j Remote Code Execution, Critical), VULN-002 (TLS 1.0/1.1, Medium), VULN-003 (Missing HTTP Headers, Low), VULN-004 (OpenSSL Heartbleed, High), and VULN-005 (Default Credentials, Critical). The client is 'Apex Healthcare Systems', assessment date is '2025-03-15', and scope is '192.168.10.0/24'. Severity colors must be: Critical=Red, High=Orange, Medium=Gold/Yellow, Low=Green.
